stemHtml:
An aeroplane is following a terminal procedure requiring the use of RNP 1. The following message appears on the Navigation Display (ND) accompanied by an aural signal:

"NAV ACCUR DOWNGRAD"

What is the significance of this message?

options.a: Some GNSS signals have been lost and RAIM is no longer available.
options.b: The aeroplane is outside the coverage of navigation aids.
options.c: The navigation accuracy is less than required accuracy of +/- 1 NM.
options.d: The FMS position is now based on the IRS position alone; EPE may be less than 1 NM.
